race.comment: GOD'S WINDOW (6) another from the Waller yard who saved ground along the inside to get the job done over this track and trip in the heavy going second-up. Grima sticks from a better draw and can win again. FORMAL DISPLAY (5) covered a stack of ground in the run and kept coming with a courageous third over 1600m in the LR Scone Cup. Gets the right run today with the claim and will prove hard to hold out. GLAD YOU THINK SO (20) strips fitter and saves his best for this course and distance. Respect on the limit weight. NARBOLD (21) comes up from Victoria and set to peak at his third run back. Sat on the speed with the 58kg for a courageous second over this trip at Sandown-Hillside in BM84 class. Well placed and maps well. Each way. YET HE MOVES (10) indicated a win was imminent when he closed strongly in the heavy conditions to finish third over this track and trip. Stays in the mix.
